positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic forest. Intricate, glowing bioluminescent trees with vibrant sapphire and emerald hues grow in a void of deep indigo and cosmic black. The atmosphere is serene and magical, with soft, nebula-like clouds floating between the branches. Central composition, clean silhouettes, high contrast between the glowing flora and the dark background. Flat graphic design style, suitable for screen printing on apparel, highly detailed yet clean lines, vector art aesthetic, dramatic rim lighting, cinematic focus.
negative: blur, grainy, watermark, text, logo, signature, low quality, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy composition, noisy, over-detailed, photo-realistic
